title: pilosella biglana
intro: Pilosella biglana, also known as Great Wood-sorrel or Pilosella grandiflora, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which are rich in tannins and flavonoids. Pilosella biglana has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and inflammation, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Pilosella biglana may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system.
